name: Meringue-Topped Apples (Apfel Mit Meringue)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the apples in a greased 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
2. Pour the melted margarine over the apples.
3. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons sugar, raisins, and Calvados.
4. Cover and cook at 350°F until the apples are tender, about 30 minutes.
5. Beat together egg whites and cream of tartar on medium speed until foamy.
6. Add 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, continuing to beat until foamy.
7. Continue beating on high speed until stiff and glossy.
8. Spread the meringue over the apples.
9. Bake until the meringue is golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes.
